title: polychroa scabra
intro: Polychroa scabra, also known as Polyscias scabra, is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its leaves and roots are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing relief from pain and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Polychroa scabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
